examples: When prepared as a dietary supplement, retinol is stabilized as the ester derivatives retinyl acetate or retinyl palmitate.
Chloramphenicol palmitate has two forms, but only one sufficiently dissolves and is absorbed to be clinically useful.
Sodium stearate and sodium palmitate produced by the reaction of saponifiable oil and alkali of degreasing solution were removed by filtration.
The Environmental Working Group report found that fewer sunscreens - about 25% - contain retinyl palmitate, compared to 33% in last year's study.
